title: Gentle Hands
lesson: Be gentle and kind to little animals.
prompts: In a sunny home garden — green grass, flowers, a low wooden fence behind — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image kneels on the green grass, beaming with excitement at a small fluffy brown puppy sitting a little way ahead, head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible and the face front-on and fully unobstructed. Medium shot at eye level, warm sunlight, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a sunny home garden — green grass, flowers, a low wooden fence behind — a small fluffy brown puppy bolts away to the right in fear, its body low and tense to the ground, ears flattened back against its head, tail clamped tightly between its legs, head whipped back over its shoulder with wide, frightened eyes and the whites showing — clearly terrified and fleeing, not playing. The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image leans forward on the grass with both hands reaching out too eagerly, looking surprised that the puppy ran off, head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible and the face front-on and unobstructed with a surprised expression. Medium shot at eye level, warm sunlight, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a sunny home garden — green grass, flowers, a low wooden fence behind — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image kneels on the far left in the mid-ground, head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible, watching attentively. In the right foreground, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} crouches calmly and holds out one slow, open hand to show how to be soft and gentle with a small fluffy brown puppy. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm sunlight, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a sunny home garden — green grass, flowers, a low wooden fence behind — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image kneels alone on the green grass, very gently stroking the back of a small fluffy brown puppy with one slow, soft hand. Medium shot at eye level, head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible, the face front-on, unobstructed, with a calm, tender smile. Warm sunlight, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a sunny home garden — green grass, flowers, a low wooden fence behind — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits on the grass as a small fluffy brown puppy relaxes and snuggles up against their side, eyes softly closed and tail wagging, facing the camera with their face fully visible and a gentle, happy expression, head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible. Medium shot at eye level, warm golden light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a sunny home garden — green grass, flowers, a low wooden fence behind — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits on the far left, facing the camera with their face fully visible and a joyful smile, gently cradling a happy, content small fluffy brown puppy in their lap. To the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} sits beside them, looking on proudly. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm golden sunlight, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
texts: In the sunny garden you met a little brown puppy. "Hello, puppy!" you said, full of excitement.
You reached out too fast, and the puppy shrank back, afraid. Oh no — that was too quick.
Dad knelt down beside you. "Be gentle," he said softly, holding out one slow, open hand.
So you stroked the puppy very gently, soft and slow. The puppy stayed close, calm and happy.
The puppy snuggled right up against you, its tail wagging. Being gentle had made a new friend!
You cuddled the happy puppy in your lap. "Good job," Dad smiled. Gentle hands are kind hands.
